title: Piece
description: An art piece in the Noir Canvas gallery. Slug format: '{artistSlug}-{sequential}' (e.g. 'kai-voss-001'). Pieces reference artists by artistSlug only — no denormalized artistName.

description.description: Substantive gallery description. Never a placeholder.

artistSlug.description: Reference to the artist. Resolved to full Artist at read time.

imageUrl.description: Relative URL to the piece's primary image.

medium.description: Artistic medium (e.g. 'Digital print on archival canvas').

editionSize.description: Total editions available. Fixed at creation, never increases.

reservedCount.description: Editions currently reserved (in cart / pending payment). Reduces visible availability without counting as sold.

availabilityStatus.description: Derived availability state. 'low-stock' when <3 remaining, 'sold-out' stays permanent unless a real reversal.

priceCents.description: Price per edition in the smallest currency unit (cents for USD). Use integer to avoid floating-point rounding.

tags.description: Categorization tags for filtering and discovery.

mockups.description: Mockup slugs referencing Mockup objects for this piece.
